name: Mushroom & Spinach Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the first 8 ingredients to make the sauce.
- Roast the red peppers, onions, and garlic.
- For microwaving onion: Place an unpeeled onion in a microwave for 5 minutes on high. In the last 2 minutes, add garlic cloves.
- Combine roasted peppers, onions, garlic, peeled, seeded, and diced tomatoes, thyme, and broth in a saucepan. Simmer for 15 minutes.
- Transfer to a food processor or blender, add hot pepper sauce and balsamic vinegar, then puree. Set aside.
2. Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions, drain, and rinse with cold water.
3. Wash spinach leaves and steam until coarsely chopped.
4. In a non-stick skillet, combine onions, tomatoes, garlic, and mushrooms; simmer until liquid evaporates (about 15 minutes). Let cool.
5. Add ricotta cheese, Swiss cheese, basil, parsley, salt, and pepper to the mushroom mixture. Mix well.
6. In an oiled 9x13 baking dish, layer noodles, spinach, onion-and-tomato mixture, Parmesan, and repeat until all ingredients are used.
7. Bake in a 350 oven for 40 minutes.
Sauce: Simmer ingredients, puree, and set aside.
Lasagna: Cook noodles, prepare vegetable mixture, assemble layers, and bake.
